title: COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH - 211info
text: MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide mental health assessments, counseling services, psychiatry (including evaluation), medication management, nursing support,and crisis intervention. Ofers mental health treatment groups, including weekly gender-specific DBT (Dialectical Behavioral Therapy) groups. 850 SW 4th Street Suite 302 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 475-6575 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-6575 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call or email for information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English; Spanish and ASL interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jefferson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - JEFFERSON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WRAPAROUND SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - OPEN ACCESS CLINIC REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - JEFFERSON COUNTY COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
